---
title: 'And then...'
date: '2017-08-27T18:03:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1913606785457987102'
blogger_filename: '/2017/08/and-then.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir="ltr">And then there's days like today. I kindly like my wife. My kids aren't so bad. The verse on my wallet reminds me that I'm a Jesus follower, it only in principle and not action, word, or deed. </p>
<p dir="ltr">I want to be pastor Darrell, but, the part of me that wants to jump through this window and have sex with ALL the girls in the coffee shop at one, right now, is still looking beneath the surface. </p>
<p dir="ltr">So... I flounder around at Jobs that aren't mine, unable to do what I should be doing.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Please kill me</p>
